creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 170466
The xinit-xsession port in shar archive

According to source files, the license is "unknown":
https://aur.archlinux.org/cgit/aur.git/tree/PKGBUILD?h=xinit-xsession&id=2bc2ea8#n7
Without proper license it may be problematic to use them as just a simple files in a "files" directory, like I did in attachment 170378. Therefore, I created a variant, which downloads them from MASTER_SITES.
